completedImprovements.title: DB disk 60%+ threshold filter remains fixed on v8.12.16
completedImprovements.evidence: DB 서버 3대 중 2대 returned: db-mysql-dc1-backup and db-mysql-dc1-primary; replica 40% excluded.

expertAssessments.rationale: Focused production QA covered today’s embedded tab copy fix plus the latest artifact envelope, quick-start, and DB threshold regression surfaces. All product checks passed on v8.12.16.
expertAssessments.nextAction: No product follow-up from this focused QA run.

expertAssessments.rationale: The direct Playwright MCP transport was unavailable in the Codex session, so the run used a Playwright CLI browser fallback. Product evidence is valid, but MCP transport health remains an automation issue.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Investigate the local Playwright MCP transport lifecycle before the next MCP-mandated QA run.

notes: v8.12.16 was deployed by GitLab tag pipeline 2548040399 before QA because Vercel production still served v8.12.15 at task start.
Direct Playwright MCP retry after deploy failed with Transport closed; next-devtools browser start also failed with Connection closed.
Playwright CLI fallback ran against https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app production, version v8.12.16 commit 0d6c1005285b04607ca39996b86305e6db85c812.
